name: The Tradefleet - Basin
reward1: Basin Ferry Token - A stamped brass chit used by Tradefleet barges. Allows the player to bypass travel checks across major waterways once per week.
reward2: Custom Traders Bundle - Choose a trade skill, item focus, or regional flavor. Staff grants a tailored inventory starter bundle (e.g., herbalist satchel, ink-stamped merchant ledger, fishmongers carved pole, etc).
reward3: Riverpass Ledger Entry - Your name is recorded in the Tradefleet ledgers. Gain access to locked RP locations (like backroom docks or barge inns). May receive courier gigs or bartering leads.
reward4: Appointed Tiderider - You are granted honorary route rights—staff may offer you a Tradefleet-flagged river barge, or a custom dock post for character use. Unlocks fleet-exclusive RP routes or bartering privileges.

name: The Krolbaul - Brackenwild
description: Ancestral wardens who speak to bark and blood.
reward1: Woodwrights Tally-stone - A hand-carved token that grants guidance through Brackenwild trails. Once per journey here, re-roll a failed Nature/Survival check.
reward2: Whispering Barkwrap (Staff Item Grant) - Gain a custom light armor or bracer inscribed with Brackenwood sigils. Staff grants a minor feature (e.g., can whistle to signal animals, inscribed old trail signs only Krolbaul understand).
reward4: Appointed Tiderider (Staff Personalized Boon - Receive a custom spiritual item (mask, knife, fanged relic) that may interact with Brackenwild NPCs, creatures, or spirits. Staff tailors the function via a short quest.

name: Lorbinders of Ardenridge - Stonehollow
description: Archivists of deep time, memory-keepers, and oath-engravers.
reward1: Echo-etched Map Fragment - A partial Stonehollow map etched in mineral wax. Grants insight into old quarry paths—allows one bonus clue during a hollow-based scene.
reward3: Echochamber Access - You are granted supervised entry into a Lorebinder echochamber—a place of memory resonance. May trigger unique lore, rumors, or personalized scene writing.

name: The Ash-Keepers - Sootbarrow
description: Forged in ruin, stewards of fire and forgotten war rites.
reward1: Ash-Sworn Cindercloak Patch A sewn sigil marking you as tolerated among pyre-tenders. Grants safe lodging at Ash-Keeper watchfires.
reward3: Rite of Smoke You gain access to an Ash-Keeper mourning rite. Staff may run a personal remembrance or fire-spoken RP scene—character may commune with emberbound memory.
reward4: Eldrkyn Banner-Thane You are entrusted as Eldrkyn Banner-Thane— a honor only given to those who have walked through fire and returned. Raising your banner may rally Ash-Keeper forces in times of conflict.

name: The Mirebound Circle - Gloamfen
description: Dreamsingers, duskwalkers, and those who speak with still water.
reward1: Fenwatchers Respite (Campers Respite) - A mire-wrought rod capped with a black-iron brazier and root-carved spike. When invoked, it kindles smokeless witchflame and unfurls into a modest fen-tent. Within lies a dry, stone-floored dwelling untouched by damp, rot, or weather. The fire burns without breath, and the walls hum faintly with marsh-lullabies.  The Mirebound gift this only to those trusted to walk the dusk without losing themselves
reward2: Murk-Speakers Favor - You may petition a minor fen-spirit for guidance once per arc.
reward4: Circle of the Quiet Deep You are named Mirebound. Staff may grant a recurring fen-spirit contact, custom swamp haven location, or narrative sway within Gloamfen territories.

name: The Holdfast Compact - Hollow Steppe
reward1: Cairnstone Marker - A stone etched with your name (or vow). May be placed IC at a route or rest point to mark safe passage—grants one-time reroll on trail mishap or lost check.
reward2: Compact Sigilwear (Staff Visual Asset) - Staff creates a symbolic item for your character (e.g., clasp, brooch, tabard edge) showing the Compacts mark. May carry weight with sentries or travelers.
reward3: Duskwatch Chronicle Entry  -A written note or deed of yours is added to the Compacts cairn-lore. Grants RP privilege to narrate/submit player-written passage in future #almanac-journal logs.
reward4: Compact Trailwright (Staff-Given Route Right) - You are entrusted with “keeping” a specific trail—staff grants access to co-write and describe a regionally flavored trail, including optional recurring NPC, custom hazard, or scenic detail.
